title: Clean unused Dark_Mellow GitHub artifacts
description: Remove clearly unused legacy artifacts from the published Dark_Mellow GitHub repository, such as old root-level wallpapers or obsolete archive remnants, while preserving the current installer, theme, launcher, README, and Pictures/Dark_Mellow install assets.
acceptance_criteria: Current installer and launcher still reference only files that remain in the repository
Obsolete root-level wallpaper/menu duplicate artifacts are removed or explicitly retained with rationale
No current install assets under .themes/Mellow-Dark or Pictures/Dark_Mellow are removed
Cleanup is committed and pushed to BigCatMellow/Dark_Mellow if validation passes
